claim: There are four spatial channels in each hemifield of the auditory cortex of cats.

result.claim: There are four spatial channels in each hemifield of the auditory cortex of cats.
result.reasoning: The searches for propositions and chunks related to "four spatial channels in each hemifield of the auditory cortex of cats," "spatial representation auditory cortex cats," and "auditory spatial channels cats" did not yield any direct evidence to support or refute the claim. While some papers discuss spatial processing and representation of sound in the mammalian and cat auditory cortex (e.g., Paper ID: 38767592, Paper ID: 27060384), none of them specify the number of spatial channels as four per hemifield. The available evidence is too general or focuses on other aspects of auditory processing to confirm or deny the specific numerical claim.
